artPrompt: A widescreen film-still of a cramped, smoke-hazed social-club back room after dark, a single low amber lamp casting a warm pool over a worn felt card table ringed by empty chairs, glasses and a chipped bottle catching the glow; ink-black shadows swallow the peeling walls, a heavy curtained doorway hinting at deeper secrets, no figures present, intimate criminal stillness, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Back Room of the Social Club
text:
{T}: Add {B}.
{2}{B}, {T}: Target opponent gains 1 life and you create a Favor token. The deals close here, over weak coffee, under a low ceiling.
flavorText: Members only. Membership is granted by the Don and revoked by the reservoir.
